caption: In an indoor setting with a blue wall featuring a framed portrait of a man in a purple suit and top hat, several characters are gathered. A yellow-skinned man in a red shirt stands behind a woman with long black hair and a man with short brown hair. A young girl with yellow skin and a red dress is also present on the left. The man with brown hair is wearing a white long-sleeved shirt and raises his right arm high with a clenched fist. As the sequence progresses, the characters' expressions shift; they all appear to be shouting or cheering with wide-open mouths. The woman with black hair moves closer to the center, and the man in the red shirt leans further over the others. The man with brown hair maintains his raised fist throughout the scene, while the young girl's expression becomes more intense.
